message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.value_counts (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering DataFrame.value_counts():

- value_counts_basic: 5-row 2-col (color, size) frame, returns
  multi-key tuple counts sorted descending

The test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.value_counts(normalize=False, sort=True, ascending=False,
dropna=True)), runs the Rust DataFrame.value_counts(), and asserts
parity via compare_series_expected. DataFrameValueCounts was already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-lizz8]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
